nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 波罗的海
nodes.summary: 波罗的海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括小天鹅、斑背潜鸭、火冠戴菊等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 克里米亚
nodes.summary: 克里米亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括火冠戴菊，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 温带阔叶混交林
nodes.summary: 温带阔叶混交林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括北美黑鸭、鬼鸮、林雕鸮等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 火冠戴菊
nodes.summary: 火冠戴菊（Common firecrest，学名 Regulus ignicapilla），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括污染。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 地中海
nodes.summary: 地中海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括大红鹳、小凤头燕鸥、細嘴鷗等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Cork woodland is favoured for breeding. The common firecrest breeds in lowland broadleaf forest, preferring cork oak and alder where available, otherwise beech and holly

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In drier Mediterranean habitats it is found in conifers, evergreen oak, and mixed woodlands up to . Unlike more specialised birds such as Eurasian nuthatch and common treecreeper, both of which forage on trunks, the crests do not need large woodlands, and their population density is independent of forest size. In winter it is less reliant on conifers than the goldcrest, moving from forest to fringes and scrub

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs singly or in pairs, spending much time in the tree canopy, although frequently venturing into bushes and other lower vegetation. This species can thrive in fairly urban areas, provided that suitable habitat is available in parks or large gardens; population densities in gardens can be comparable with the maximum levels found in natural habitats. The nominate subspecies breeds in Europe from southern England, France, Spain and Portugal east to Belarus, northwestern Ukraine, and Greece, and north to the Baltic and southern Latvia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are isolated populations east of the main range in Abkhazia, the Crimea and Turkey

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are isolated populations east of the main range in Abkhazia, the Crimea and Turkey

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: 21–29 in A population was found in northern Morocco in 1986. Population growth may be limited by lack of suitable habitat, and there may be local declines due to loss of conifers through storms or replacement by plantations of native deciduous trees. There may also be localised losses in areas of high heavy metal pollution, which particularly affects ground feeders like thrushes and conifer foliage gleaners, including both European Regulus species
